title: Cast value to integer gives wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casting (id UInt32, decimal_value Decimal(5, 2), int_value Int32);
ALTER TABLE test_casting UPDATE int_value = toInt32(decimal_value) WHERE decimal_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, decimal_value, int_value FROM test_casting WHERE int_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toInt32(toFloat64(decimal_value)) FROM test_casting WHERE decimal_value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Casting decimal values to integer produces incorrect results
